creator: rkoberman@gmail.com
text:
Worked correctly for me.Looks like your ports tree is not current. Check it with "grep PORTVERSION graphics/gpu-firmware-intel".

If it is not "20230625", update your tree:
# cd /usr/ports
# git pull

I should mention that I only install firmware for my GPU (Alder Lake), so I install graphics/gpu-firmware-intel@alderlake. I don't see why that might make a difference, though.
